de.uka.ilkd.key.java

Class Services

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TermServices

    public class Services
extends java.lang.Object
implements TermServices
    this is a collection of common services to the KeY prover. Services include information on the underlying Java model and a converter to transform Java program elements to logic (where possible) and back.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  Services.ITermProgramVariableCollectorFactory

      Constructors

      Services(Profile profile)
      creates a new Services object with a new TypeConverter and a new JavaInfo object with no information stored at none of these.

      creates a new services object containing a copy of the java info of this object and a new TypeConverter (shallow copy) The copy does not belong to a Proof object and can hence be used for a new proof.

        public VariableNamer getVariableNamer()
        Returns the VariableNamer associated with this Services object.

      • copy

        public Services copy(boolean shareCaches)
        creates a new services object containing a copy of the java info of this object and a new TypeConverter (shallow copy) The copy does not belong to a Proof object and can hence be used for a new proof.
        Parameters:
        shareCaches - true The created Services will use the same ServiceCaches like this instance; false the created Services will use a new empty ServiceCaches instance.
        Returns:
        the copy

      • copy

        public Services copy(Profile profile,
                     boolean shareCaches)
        Creates a copy of this Services in which the Profile is replaced. The copy does not belong to a Proof object and can hence be used for a new proof.
        Parameters:
        profile - The new Profile to use in the copy of this Services.
        shareCaches - true The created Services will use the same ServiceCaches like this instance; false the created Services will use a new empty ServiceCaches instance.
        Returns:
        The created copy.

      • shallowCopy

        public Services shallowCopy()
        Generate a copy of this object. All references are copied w/o duplicating their content.
        Returns:
        a freshly created Services object

      • copyPreservesLDTInformation

        public Services copyPreservesLDTInformation()
        creates a new service object with the same ldt information as the actual one

      • setProof

        public void setProof(Proof p_proof)
        Marks this services as proof specific Please make sure that the Services does not not yet belong to an existing proof or that it is owned by a proof environment. In both cases copy the InitConfig via InitConfig.deepCopy() or one of the other copy methods first.
        Parameters:
        p_proof - the Proof to which this Services instance belongs

      • copyProofSpecific

        public Services copyProofSpecific(Proof p_proof,
                                  boolean shareCaches)

        Returns:

        public void setNamespaces(NamespaceSet namespaces)
        sets the namespaces of known predicates, functions, variables
        Parameters:
        namespaces - the NamespaceSet with the proof specific namespaces

      • getProof

        public Proof getProof()
        Returns the proof to which this object belongs, or null if it does not belong to any proof.

      • getProfile

        Returns the sued Profile.
        Returns:
        The used Profile.

      • getCaches

        public ServiceCaches getCaches()
        Returns the used ServiceCaches.
        Returns:
        The used ServiceCaches.

      • getTermBuilder

        public TermBuilder getTermBuilder(boolean withCache)
        Returns either the cache backed or raw TermBuilder used to create Terms. Usually the cache backed version is the intended one. The non-cached version is for use cases where a lot of intermediate terms are created of which most exist only for a very short time. To avoid polluting the cache it is then recommended to use the non-cache version
        Specified by:
        getTermBuilder in interface TermServices
        Returns:
        The TermBuilder used to create Terms.

      • getTermBuilder

        public TermBuilder getTermBuilder()
        Returns the TermBuilder used to create Terms. Same as {@link #getTermBuilder(true).
        Specified by:
        getTermBuilder in interface TermServices
        Returns:
        The TermBuilder used to create Terms.

      • getTermFactory

        public TermFactory getTermFactory()
        Returns the TermFactory used to create Terms.
        Specified by:
        getTermFactory in interface TermServices
        Returns:
        The TermFactory used to create Terms.
